Introduction
    Zhang Wei, the general manager of a five-star hotel, was pressured by work throughout his life until he met Luo Xi, a girl who could get Zhang Wei out of his busy state. Zhang Wei was impressed by the goodness and beauty of Luo Xi...

Also known as: マイ・ヒーリング・ガーデン～僕の恋する葡萄園～
